purpose: Sanitized minimal offline fixtures for a repaired Naver News parser. All fixtures must be hand-trimmed, anonymized where noted, and contain no tracking params, no nlog GDIDs tied to real impressions beyond structure, and no personal data.
compliance_note: search.naver.com and news.naver.com robots.txt are 'User-agent: * / Disallow: /'. Owner adjudication or migration to the official Naver Search Open API is required before live collection; fixtures below are for offline parser tests only.

root_cause_reference.rss_endpoint: https://search.naver.com/search.naver?where=rss&query=<q> returns text/html (full search page), never XML -> ET.ParseError -> parse_failed
root_cause_reference.html_fallback: class 'news_tit' no longer exists on where=news pages (0 occurrences); replaced by sds-comps markup -> empty result -> settings fallback

fixtures.sanitization: keep 3 article blocks; replace hashed classes (fender-ui_*, random 16-char) with FENDER_HASH placeholders is NOT allowed - keep them verbatim so parser proves it does not depend on them; replace real headline text with synthetic Korean headlines; keep <mark> tags in one title

fixtures.encoding_warning: collector currently decodes utf-8 only; fixture must exercise EUC-KR handling
fixtures.sanitization: keep one rankingnews_box with 2 ranked items; synthetic titles; keep real class names and n.news.naver.com link shape with fake press/article ids (e.g. 000/0000000001)
keep 2 sa_item blocks; synthetic titles; keep data-nlog-params JSON shape ({"section1_id":"100","rank":1}) with fake ids; strip data-imp-gdid values to placeholder
first ~40 lines of the HTML doctype page only; enough to trigger ET.ParseError
fixtures.expected_behavior: parser must classify as content_type_drift (or parse_failed) WITHOUT raising, and must proceed to the HTML search fallback; workflow_completed must not regress

cross_cutting_requirements.fallback_first: all fixture-driven failure paths must end in a usable fallback result, never an exception escaping collect()
cross_cutting_requirements.status_fields: last_status must report failed_reason/final_error_type consistent with existing priority list in _primary_failed_reason
cross_cutting_requirements.no_live_calls_in_tests: fixture tests must never hit naver hosts
